seo_title: How Google Brings People Together at AI for the Economy Forum
meta_description: Discover how Google is fostering collaboration and innovation in the AI industry through its AI for the Economy Forum.
body_html:
Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.

Building a Collaborative EcosystemMore than 200 experts and thought leaders from around the world are coming together to share knowledge and ideas on how to harness AI for economic growth.The forum aims to create a platform for collaboration, innovation, and knowledge-sharing among industry stakeholders.Innovation and Adaption in the New EraKey TakeawaysGoogle's AI for the Economy Forum is focused on exploring the potential of AI to drive economic growth and improve people's lives.Creating Opportunity through AI"AI has the potential to unlock new opportunities for economic growth, innovation, and job creation." -

source.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
source.summary: Woman working with a large tool. On the left are the Google and MIT FutureTech logos, "AI for the Economy Forum", and "Innovation and Adaption in the New Era"
